name: Whole Wheat Soft Pretzels - Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the whole wheat flour and bread flour in the bread pan. Add dry milk, salt, shortening, molasses, water, and dry yeast into the yeast holder. Select WHOLE WHEAT DOUGH MODE. Press start. The Breadmaker will complete the basic dough mode in 3 hours and 15 minutes.
2. Divide the dough into 8 equal portions. Roll each portion on a lightly floured surface into a ball. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 20 minutes.
3. Using the palm of your hand, roll each ball into a rope about 10 inches long.
4. Twist once where the dough overlaps.
5. Lift the ends across to opposite edges. Tuck the ends under.
6. Place on a greased baking pan. Spray water on top. Proof at 90°F for 30 to 50 minutes.
7. Brush with beaten egg. Add any desired toppings.
8. Bake in an oven set to 375°F for 15 to 22 minutes.
